name: cursor-to-codex
description: Migrate Cursor configuration (rules, skills, commands, MCP, hooks) into Codex artifacts (AGENTS.md, .codex/config.toml, .agents/skills, .codex/hooks.json).

interface.longDescription: One-time migrator that converts a repo's Cursor configuration into the equivalent Codex artifacts. Translates .cursor/rules/*.mdc, .cursorrules, skills, commands, .cursor/mcp.json, and .cursor/hooks.json into AGENTS.md (root + nested), .agents/skills, .codex/config.toml, and .codex/hooks.json for both project and global scopes.
defaultPrompt: Migrate my Cursor configuration to Codex.
Preview the Cursor to Codex migration for this repo (dry run).
